sections.title: Angles and triangles
sections.description: Complementary and supplementary angles, angles at a point, triangle angle sum, the exterior angle theorem, and clock angles.

sections.title: Parallel lines
sections.description: Corresponding, alternate and cointerior angles, deciding whether lines are parallel, and adding an auxiliary parallel line to solve harder problems.

sections.title: Enlargement and similar figures
sections.description: Enlarging figures from a centre of enlargement, scale factors, and using similarity to find unknown lengths.

sections.title: Similar triangles
sections.description: The four tests for similar triangles (SSS, SAS, AAA, RHS) and using similarity to find unknown lengths.

sections.title: Proving and applying similar triangles
sections.description: Writing full similarity proofs with reasons, and applying similar triangles to practical measurement problems like shadows, rivers and chasms.
